name: Civic Compass
description: An interactive, non-partisan election guide that helps Indian voters navigate registration deadlines, polling timelines, and step-by-step civic actions—with guided wizards, jurisdiction filters, and persistent progress tracking.
majorCapabilities: Interactive election timeline with search and jurisdiction filtering
Step-by-step guided wizards for voter registration (Form 6) and electoral roll verification
Persistent checklist progress saved locally on device
Upcoming deadline alerts in the global status bar
Links to official ECI, Voters Service Portal, and Electoral Search sources
